EasyRail LLC is a U.S.-based money transfer business organized in Delaware and operating in Texas. We provide domestic money transfer services and plan to introduce limited international remittances on a phased basis through approved corridors only. We are seeking a banking relationship to support a custodial / For-Benefit-Of (FBO) account structure to properly segregate customer funds from operating funds and to support transparent, auditable funds flow. Customer funds are held temporarily and solely for the purpose of completing authorized transfers or issuing approved refunds. Plan Your new design enhances several key areas: 1. Ingestion: Explicitly focusing on Webhooks via AWS API Gateway + AWS Lambda for custom CRMs ensures true real-time, event-driven ingestion, acknowledging that off-the-shelf connectors won't suffice. Snowflake Utilization: Your plan to use Snowpipe Streaming API for sub-second latency and leveraging Snowflake STREAMS and TASKS for real-time Bronze-to-Silver layer transformations is a perfect native fit. Updated: 1. Core Infrastructure & Property Definitions Property : The specific real estate location (multifamily complex, single-family rental, etc.) where the network is installed and services are delivered. System : The comprehensive network infrastructure, including the headend, data center, switches, routers, and the physical connections required to deliver data from the provider to the end-user. Risk Mitigation Infrastructure : Defined in your MSA as the managed bulk internet services and underlying hardware/software utilized to mitigate property risk through connectivity. Home Run Wiring : The physical cabling running from the Demarcation Point (the external entry point) to the Connection Point (the entry to the individual unit). This wiring is typically owned by the Operator and is 

---

Property The real property owned by the Owner where the infrastructure is located. System The overall network infrastructure used to deliver internet services, including the headend, data center, network switches, routers, and the connections between components . Risk Mitigation Infrastructure Described as the core managed bulk internet services and related hardware/software provided by the Operator to the Property. Home Run Wiring The portion of the Internal Wiring running from the Demarcation Point to the Connection Point within each Unit. It connects the Operator’s distribution system to the unit-specific wiring. Inside Wiring Referred to in these agreements as Internal Wiring or In-Unit Wiring . It consists of the cabling on the Resident/User side of the Demarcation Point used to deliv

According to the Negative Covenants outlined in the Stock Purchase Agreement, Fiberwave's ability to spend large sums without your approval is strictly limited while the debt to you remains outstanding. Spending Restrictions Under Section 7.B Fiberwave is prohibited from taking the following actions without your consent until the Note and all obligations are "fully and indefeasibly paid in cash": • General Expense Limit: The Corporation may not "create, incur, assume, or authorize any other additional expenses" exceeding $250,000 in any one calendar year. • C-Suite Compensation: They are restricted from entering into or amending C-suite level engagement agreements that exceed $500,000 per annum. • Existing Agreements: They cannot authorize amendments to current engageme
